title: Huawei S530-24ST4XE Gigabit fiber switch, 16x SFP, 8x SFP / GLAN combo, 4x SFP+
description: Huawei eKitEngine S530-24ST4XE< is an advanced L3+ switch that offers 16x SFP, 8x SFP / GLAN combo and 4x SFP+ ports. On the front side, there are also two SFP+ ports for stacking (configuration available only via CLI), 2x RJ45 for management and console, a USB port, and a reset and mode buttons. On the back, it is equipped with one power supply and a slot for an additional one The eKitEngine S530 switch series are developed on a high-performance, next-generation hardware and software platform. This platform supports simplified operations and maintenance, provides diverse L3 functions, and advanced IPv6 features. Redundant power with hot-swap capability is ensured by a pair of power supplies (one power supply is included in the package, the second can be optionally purchased). The switch also offers two dedicated ports for stacking . These switches can be used in… Flexible Ethernet Networking: Supports traditional STP, RSTP, MSTP, and the modern Ethernet Ring Protection Switching (ERPS) as defined in ITU-T G.8032, offering millisecond-level failover Advanced Security Mechanisms: Features MAC address authentication , 802.1X authentication , dynamic policy delivery (VLAN, QoS, ACL), and protection against DoS and DHCP spoofing attacks . Includes DHCP snooping with trusted port configuration and strict ARP learning Easy Management & Maintenance: Supports SNMP v1/v2c/v3 , CLI , web interface , and SSH v2.0 . Also compatible with Huaweiâs eKit App for remote configuration and monitoring Redundant & Hot-Swappable Power: Equipped with dual power modules (1 included, 1 optional)…
